What We Do

Full-Service
Marine Excellence

From a single electronics install to a complete helm transformation — we handle every detail, on-site or at our Boca Raton shop.

01
Custom Dash & Switch Panels

CNC-machined from cast acrylic and stainless steel. Laser-engraved labels, backlit switches, polished hand-finished edges — factory quality exceeded, every time.

Learn More →
02
Marine Electronics Installation

Chartplotters, MFDs, radar, VHF radios, AIS, autopilots, NMEA 2000 networks — we're a certified dealer and installer for Garmin, Simrad, Raymarine, JL Audio, and Fusion.

Learn More →
03
Marine Audio Systems

Premium marine audio from JL Audio and Fusion. Tower speakers, subwoofers, amplifiers, and full system integration — clean installs that sound as good as they look.

Learn More →
04
Autopilot & Navigation Systems

Full autopilot installation and calibration, NMEA 2000 network integration, thermal and night-vision cameras, and satellite communication systems.

Learn More →
05
Electrical Troubleshooting & Repair

Marine electrical diagnosis, repair, and upgrades. Whether it's a gremlin in the wiring or a complete system overhaul — we find it and fix it right.

Learn More →
06
Mobile Service & On-Site Installs

Can't bring the boat to us? We come to you. We service vessels across Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties — dockside, at your marina, or at your home.

Learn More →
Our Signature Work

Custom Dash &
Switch Panels

Built to exceed OEM factory standards — every panel is engineered, fabricated, and finished in-house at our Boca Raton facility.

  • 01
    Design & CNC Machining Panels are precision-cut using CNC machines from premium cast acrylic and stainless steel — engineered to exact vessel specifications.
  • 02
    Laser Engraving & Backlighting Switch labels are laser-engraved for permanence. LED backlighting options add a clean, professional finish to any helm.
  • 03
    Hand-Finished Edges Every panel edge is hand-polished to a high degree — a level of detail and fitment that often surpasses original factory work.
  • 04
    Full Wiring Harness & Install Hidden mounting hardware, full wiring harness assembly, and clean professional installation — no loose wires, no shortcuts.
See Our Panel Work →
Why SN Yacht Services

The SN Difference

🏆
Certified Expertise

Garmin Factory Certified, Airmar Certified, NMEA Electronics Installer, and ABYC Certified — the credentials that back up our craftsmanship.

🔬
Obsessive Detail

Our panels and installs routinely exceed OEM factory standards. If it's not perfect, it doesn't leave our shop. Period.

🤝
Customer-First Communication

We communicate every step of the process. High return-customer rate and five-star reviews tell the story better than we can.

📍
Locally Owned, South Florida

Boca Raton-based, mobile-capable. We're your neighbors on the water — not a remote parts company that ships you a box.

Authorized Dealer

The Brands We Trust

We're an authorized dealer for the marine industry's most respected names — which means factory-trained installation, genuine products, and full warranty support.
